mapper.select:
select * from accounts
active = 1
order by asset_category, investment_type, institution, name
mapper.update: update accounts set name = #{name}, institution = #{institution}, account_no_masked = #{accountNoMasked}, asset_category = #{assetCategory}, investment_type = #{investmentType}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, custom_fields = #{customFields}, remark = #{remark}, active = #{active} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select name from investment_types where active = 1 order by created_at desc, id desc
